name: @borjie/bias-handling
description: SOTA bias handling. Extends @borjie/fairness-eval (counterfactual / individual) with: 8 group-fairness metrics (AIF360-inspired), 3-tier mitigation (pre/in/post-process per Fairlearn taxonomy), 5 LLM bias benchmark runners (BBQ / StereoSet / CrowS-Pairs / HONEST / RealToxicityPrompts), production drift monitor (KS-test rolling-window), Slice Finder subgroup discovery, and a 5-jurisdiction anti-discrimination law map (US-FHA, US-ECOA, UK-EqA, KE-Const-Art27, TZ-Const-Art13). Pure-TS, zero runtime dependencies.
